reviews.comment:
El autoservicio es muy completo, tiene muchas cosas para llevar de regalo, dulces artesanales, golosinas, embutidos.

(Translated by Google)
The self-service store is very complete, it has many things to take away as gifts, artisanal sweets, candies, and cold cuts.

reviews.comment:
Parece un lugar viejo y atrapado en otra época. Dsp el servicio es simple y cumple con ser una parada para los q vuelven de la costa mayormente y requieren un break Rutero.

(Translated by Google)
It looks like an old place, stuck in another era. The service is simple and serves its purpose as a stop for those returning from the coast, mostly those needing a break on their road trip.
